description: Active minimal recovery/regression batch for the current agent-acceptance repository.

tasks.title: Recovery docs present
tasks.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; files=['docs/RECOVERY_PIPELINE_RUNBOOK.md','docs/NEXT_AGENT_HANDOFF.md']; raise SystemExit(0 if all(Path(f).exists() for f in files) else 1)"

tasks.title: Recovery-related workflow closure tests
tasks.command: python -c "import time; time.sleep(0.2)"; python -m pytest tests/test_workflow_closure_validation.py tests/test_chain_evidence_hardening.py -q

tasks.title: Existing recovery-style run evidence remains valid
Recovery queue points to batch-recovery-regression.json
tasks.command: python -c "import json, pathlib, sys; q=json.loads(pathlib.Path('agent-workqueue/recovery-regression.queue.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); sys.exit(0 if q['items'][0]['task_file']=='scripts/examples/batch-recovery-regression.json' else 1)"
